lastReleaseMessage: Course-refresh cron moved off GitHub Actions onto local Task Scheduler.

barRaise.topFinding: Doc-currency drift accelerated overnight and now competes with the pin-completeness gap for top spot. Today's docs/CANONICAL_AUDIT-2026-05-28.md opened two new HIGH items and one MED-HIGH: PROJECT_SPEC.md line 142 still cross-references 'pending Decision 26 capture' for the monetization pivot, but slot 26 was claimed on 2026-05-26 by the course-refresh cron host change. docs/launch-checklist-1.0.md still reads 'Last refresh 2026-05-21, anchored to 0.28.1' five MINOR ships after the code moved on. And the 0.33.1 release-cut has been sitting uncommitted in the working tree for ~3 days with CONTEXT.md, package.json, PROJECT_SPEC.md, and ten more files modified, which is the exact FUSE-truncation risk window the project's own runbook warns against. The pin-completeness HIGH from yesterday is unchanged: still no N6 in the launch checklist, still 499/500 sampled courses flagged.
